title: LCA Software Training Book - Simapro
author: kaveh, mahan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this course, we will first introduce the life cycle assessment and learn the applications of the life cycle method, the steps of implementing its methods, specific features and software related to the life cycle method. In the following, we will examine the components of SimaPro software and examine all the windows of this software. Then we start working with the SimaPro software using the ready-made example of evaluating the life cycle of the coffee maker and run this example completely in this software. In the following, we analyze the tea machine without using the guide in SimaPro software. Also, for a better understanding of the content, two examples of comparing harmful loads on the environment in agricultural production and comparing harmful loads on the environment in two methods of moving the product are implemented in this software. Finally, we perform a Monte Carlo analysis and after checking the energy in the life cycle assessment, we teach how to output from SimaPro.
